title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: docs/architecture_summary.md (第 1 至 141 行，共 141 行) ---
   1 | # Architecture Summary
   2 | 
   3 | ## Project Overview
   4 | 
   5 | Mini Claude Code CLI is a lightweight AI engineering agent system that replicates the core capabilities of Claude Code:
   6 | 
   7 | - ✅ Tool calling (file operations, code search, Git management, test execution)
   8 | - ✅ Task planning system (structured Plan management)
   9 | - ✅ Three-layer memory architecture (Working / Episodic / Long-term)
  10 | - ✅ Multi-strategy context compression (LLM_SUMMARY / KEYFRAME / SLIDING_WINDOW / IMPORTANCE_FILTER)
  11 | - ✅ Session persistence and recovery
  12 | - ✅ Git automation safety net (shadow branches, auto snapshots, failure rollback)
  13 | 
  14 | ## System Architecture
  15 | 
  16 | ```
  17 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  18 | │                      User Interaction (main.py)                 │
  19 | │  REPL loop · Command parsing · Rich console display             │
  20 | └───────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┘
  21 |                                 │
  22 |                                 ▼
  23 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  24 | │                      AgentEngine (core/engine.py)               │
  25 | │  execute_query() · _call_llm() · Parallel tool execution        │
  26 | │  Git safety net · Session save/restore                          │
  27 | └───────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┘
  28 |                                 │
  29 |           ┌─────────────┬───────┴───────┬─────────────┐
  30 |           ▼             ▼               ▼             ▼
  31 | ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐
  32 | │ ContextManager│ │  PlanManager  │ │  Tool System  │ │ BM25Retriever │
  33 | │  (context.py) │ │  (plan.py)    │ │ (tools/*.py)  │ │ (bm25.py)     │
  34 | │ Messages      │ │ Tasks & Goal  │ │ Bash · File   │ │ Keyword index │
  35 | │ 3-layer mem   │ │ Validation    │ │ Search · Test │ │ BM25 search   │
  36 | │ Compression   │ │ Auto-fix      │ │ Plan · Git    │ │ History inject│
  37 | └───────────────┘ └───────────────┘ └───────────────┘ └───────────────┘
  38 |         │                   │
  39 |         ▼                   ▼
  40 | ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐
  41 | │ Compression   │ │SessionManager │
  42 | │   Engine      │ │(session_mgr)  │
  43 | │ LLM_SUMMARY   │ │ Session list  │
  44 | │ KEYFRAME      │ │ Incomplete    │
  45 | │ SLIDING_WINDOW│ │ detection     │
  46 | └───────────────┘ └───────────────┘
  47 | ```
  48 | 
  49 | ## Three-Layer Memory Architecture
  50 | 
  51 | ```
  52 | User Input
  53 |     │
  54 |     ▼
  55 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  56 | │  Working Memory (20 messages, FIFO eviction)         │
  57 | │  Real-time access · Latest context                   │
  58 | └───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────┘
  59 |                             │ Eviction
  60 |                             ▼
  61 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  62 | │  Episodic Memory (50 summaries, importance eviction) │
  63 | │  Structured summaries · Keyword search               │
  64 | └───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────┘
  65 |                             │ Archive
  66 |                             ▼
  67 | ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  68 | │  Long-term Memory (unlimited, disk JSON storage)     │
  69 | │  Cross-session retrieval · Inverted index + IDF      │
  70 | │  Storage path: memory/long_term/*.json                │
  71 | └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
  72 | ```
  73 | 
  74 | ## Core Modules
  75 | 
  76 | ### engine.py — Main Loop
  77 | 
  78 | | Method | Description |
  79 | |--------|-------------|
  80 | | `execute_query(input)` | Main reasoning loop (max 80 steps) |
  81 | | `_ca...
